content:
MODULE: cosmos.cli.swarm_session
FILE: cosmos/cli/swarm_session.py (780 lines)
CATEGORY: cli

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Swarm Session - CLI to Swarm A2A Integration.

AGI v1.8.4 Feature: Enables CLI users to interact directly with the
agent swarm through A2A sessions.

Features:
- Start/end swarm sessions from CLI
- Trigger deliberations on user queries
- Stream agent responses in real-time
- View agent status

CLASSES:
- SessionState(Enum): State of a CLI swarm session.
- AgentStatus(Enum): Status of an agent in the session.
- AgentInfo: Information about an agent in the session.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- AgentResponse: A response from an agent during chat/deliberation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DeliberationProgress: Progress of an ongoing deliberation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- SwarmSession: CLI user's A2A session with the swarm.

Enables users to:
- Connect to the agent
  Methods: async def connect(self, agents: Optional[List[str]]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self) -> bool
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: def connect_collective_bridge(self, bridge) -> None
  Methods: def connect_a2a_mesh(self, mesh) -> None
  Methods: async def chat(self, message: str, stream: bool=True) -> AsyncIterator[AgentResponse]
  Methods: async def start_deliberation(self, prompt: str, agents: Optional[List[str]]=None) -> AsyncIterator[A
  Methods: def get_deliberation_progress(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
- SwarmSessionManager: Manages multiple CLI swarm sessions.
  Methods: def create_session(self, session_id: Optional[str]=None) -> SwarmSession
  Methods: def get_session(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[SwarmSession]
  Methods: def get_active_session(self) -> Optional[SwarmSession]
  Methods: def set_active_session(self, session_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def list_sessions(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def close_session(self, session_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def close_all(self) -> None

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_swarm_session(session_id: Optional[str]=None, data_dir: str='./data/cli_sessions') -> SwarmSession
- def get_session_manager() -> SwarmSessionManager
